FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Class RepeatTicker

Namespace
FluentGpu.Animation
Assembly
FluentGpu.Animation.dll

Drives WinUI RepeatButton auto-repeat: while a repeat node is held, its click handler is invoked once on press, then after an initial delay, then at a fixed interval. A host system armed by the dispatcher on press / released on up (the InteractionAnimator/ScrollAnimator idiom), ticked once per frame in the host loop and reported through HasActive so frames keep flowing while held — and stop the instant it's released (no busy loop). Zero alloc on a steady frame (invokes the already-stored click Action). Delay/Interval come from the node (InteractionInfo.RepeatDelayMs/RepeatIntervalMs; NaN/non-positive = the WinUI DP defaults, validated positive like RepeatButton_Partial.cpp:149-182). While the held pointer leaves the node the ticker PAUSES; re-entry resumes with a fresh initial delay and never an immediate re-fire (RepeatButton_Partial.cpp:530-548, :565-574).

public sealed class RepeatTicker

object
RepeatTicker

Constructors

RepeatTicker(SceneStore) 

public RepeatTicker(SceneStore scene)

Parameters

scene SceneStore

Properties

HasActive

True while armed AND ticking — a paused ticker needs no frames (the resuming pointer move wakes it).

public bool HasActive { get; }

Property Value

bool

Methods

Arm(NodeHandle)

Begin auto-repeat for node: fire the click once now, then schedule the repeat.

public void Arm(NodeHandle node)

Parameters

node NodeHandle

Disarm(NodeHandle)

Stop auto-repeat (on pointer-up / key-up / cancel) if node is the active one.

public void Disarm(NodeHandle node)

Parameters

node NodeHandle

Pause(NodeHandle)

The held pointer left the armed node: stop ticking (idempotent; stays armed for a Resume).

public void Pause(NodeHandle node)

Parameters

node NodeHandle

Resume(NodeHandle)

The held pointer re-entered the armed node: restart with a FRESH initial delay — never an immediate re-fire (idempotent while already running).

public void Resume(NodeHandle node)

Parameters

node NodeHandle

Tick(float) 

public void Tick(float dtMs)

Parameters

dtMs float
FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
